programs.title: Alex Rider
programs.desc: Alex returns home with a dark mission of revenge. Jack, Tom and Kyra must enlist the help of unlikely allies to save Alex before he commits to Scorpia forever.

programs.title: Alex Rider
programs.desc: Captured and questioned by the Department, Alex must rely on his friends to remind him who he truly is. But are there still truths about his past the Department haven't told him?

programs.title: Alex Rider
programs.desc: As Scorpia orchestrate the final stages of their plan to threaten the lives of an entire British city, Alex must again go back undercover in a desperate bid to stop Julia Rothman before it's too late.

programs.title: Alex Rider
programs.desc: Travelling to Malta in search of answers about his past, Alex and his best friends Tom and Kyra uncover the beginnings of a deadly plot and the identity of Scorpia's charismatic new leader.

programs.title: Alex Rider
programs.desc: As the Department receive a horrifying threat against the United Kingdom, Alex follows the trail of a shady scientist working for Scorpia to a secret laboratory aboard a decommissioned ship.

programs.title: Alex Rider
programs.desc: Alex has been captured and Tom, Kyra and Jack must scramble to find him. As Scorpia demonstrate the power of their new weapon, Invisible Sword, Alex is confronted by Julia Rothman with some uncomfortable truths about his father.
